headline: Jacobs serving as technical advisor as construction begins on New York State’s $1.7B public health laboratory
summary: DALLAS, June 23, 2026--Jacobs serves as technical advisor for the progressive design-build of NY State Department of Health’s new Wadsworth Center Public Health Laboratory.
